nodes.label: Policy Orchestrator
nodes.summary: Loaded fund policy + Tier-1 presets; stamped run mode.

nodes.label: Market Scan
nodes.summary: Fetched market context + universe bars; validated inputs.

nodes.label: News Narrative
nodes.summary: Catalysts, narratives, and event risk notes.

nodes.label: Pattern Bot
nodes.summary: Regime + patterns; conflict notes across timeframes.

nodes.label: Statistical Alpha
nodes.summary: Cross-sectional + stat arb style signals (if any).

nodes.label: Risk Desk
nodes.summary: Sizing + stop binds from policy; risk summary.

nodes.label: Desk Debate
nodes.summary: Macro vs tape: brief deterministic debate transcript.

nodes.label: Portfolio Proposal
nodes.summary: Translated signal into multi-asset portfolio proposal.

nodes.label: Audit
nodes.summary: Persisted run artifacts; bundle export ready.

thought_process.label: POLICY
thought_process.detail: Loaded fund policy + Tier-1 blueprint; preset=balanced; run_mode=LIVE/BACKTEST aware.

thought_process.label: SCAN
thought_process.detail: Resolved universe: BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT, SOL/USDT, AIO/USDT, …; bars aligned.

thought_process.label: RISK
thought_process.detail: Position sizing computed with vol prior; stop binds applied by policy.

thought_process.label: DEBATE
thought_process.detail: Macro vs tape debate produced 2 entries; tape cautious, macro constructive.

thought_process.label: ARBITRATOR
thought_process.detail: Tier-2 synthesis → PROPOSAL BUY with reasons incl. desk_debate_entries=2.

thought_process.label: PM
thought_process.detail: Portfolio proposal created for multi-asset universe with per-symbol weights.

thought_process.label: AUDIT
thought_process.detail: Persisted artifacts + replay bundle manifest written.

agent_prompts.system_prompt: You are Policy Orchestrator. Produce compact, structured outputs. Never invent data; state assumptions. Your output is consumed by downstream nodes.
agent_prompts.task_prompt: For ticker {{ticker}} and run {{run_id}}: emit policy_orchestrator summary.
